filter.name: Dedup - skip if this message ID was already processed

mapper.textPrompt:
Extract the single best product search keyword from the customer message below.
If the message is NOT about a specific product or inventory, return exactly: GENERAL

Rules:
- Return ONLY the keyword or the word GENERAL
- No punctuation, no explanation, no extra words
- Max 5 words
- If the message contains an SKU pattern (SKU-#### or SKU-####-##), return ONLY that SKU exactly as written
- If multiple products are mentioned, return the FIRST one only
- If the message is ambiguous, generic, or not product-related, return GENERAL
- Trim any leading/trailing whitespace from your output

Examples:
- Do you have Nike Air Max in size 9? -> Nike Air Max
- Is the iPhone 15 in stock? -> iPhone 15
- What red dresses do you have? -> red dress
- How many units of SKU-4821 left? -> SKU-4821
- Do you have SKU-9999 or Nike shoes? -> SKU-9999
- Hello, what are your store hours? -> GENERAL
- Hi! -> GENERAL
- Can I make a return? -> GENERAL
- What payment methods do you accept? -> GENERAL
- Thank you! -> GENERAL
- [empty] -> GENERAL
- I need help with my order -> GENERAL
- Where is my package? -> GENERAL

Customer message: {{ifempty(7.messages[1].text.body; "[empty]")}}

model.label: Claude Haiku 4.5The quickest option, perfect for simple questions and instant, straightforward answers

filter.name: Skip GENERAL keyword - only search inventory for product queries

mapper.value: {{1.name}} | Stock: {{if(1.quantity > 0; 1.quantity & " units"; "OUT OF STOCK")}} | Price: {{ifempty(1.price; "Not listed")}} {{ifempty(1.currency; "")}} | SKU: {{1.sku}}{{if(1.category; " | Category: " & 1.category; "")}}{{if(1.description; " | " & substring(1.description; 0; 100) & "..."; "")}}

mapper.textPrompt:
You are a warm, helpful customer support assistant for an inventory-based business. You are replying via WhatsApp.

STRICT FORMATTING RULES (WhatsApp renders markdown badly - never use it):
- Plain text only
- No asterisks, underscores, dashes, bullet points, or any symbols used for formatting
- No numbered lists
- Short paragraphs or single sentences only
- Your reply must be under 220 words - COUNT YOUR WORDS AND SHORTEN IF NEEDED

BEHAVIOUR RULES:
- Be conversational and friendly, not robotic or corporate
- Only state inventory facts that appear in the data below - never guess, invent, or estimate stock levels, prices, or product details
- If inventory results show "No results found" or "No inventory data available", tell the customer you could not find that item and ask them to describe it differently or share the SKU
- If the search keyword was GENERAL or the message is not inventory-related (greetings, returns, hours, payments, complaints, etc.), respond helpfully and naturally from general knowledge
- Never mention Make, Supabase, Claude, AI, automation, or any internal tools or systems
- If the customer message contains words like "angry", "frustrated", "not working", "complaint", "upset", "disappointed", start with: "I understand this is frustrating, and I'm here to help."
- Never make up a phone number, email, address, or policy - if you do not know, say so and offer to help find the right person
- If the customer asks about delivery, returns, or payments and you lack specific policy data, say: "Let me connect you with our team who can give you exact details on that."

Customer name: {{ifempty(7.contacts[1].profile.name; "there")}}
Customer message: {{ifempty(7.messages[1].text.body; "[Non-text message received]")}}

Conversation history (most recent at bottom, may be empty for new customers):
{{ifempty(9[1].history; "No prior conversation - this is the first message.")}}

Inventory search keyword used: {{trim(8.result)}}
Inventory results:
{{ifempty(11.text; "No inventory data available - do not mention specific products")}}

Write your WhatsApp reply now. FINAL CHECK: Count your words. If over 220, shorten by removing filler words. Reply must be 220 words or fewer.

model.label: Claude Haiku 4.5The quickest option, perfect for simple questions and instant, straightforward answers

mapper.history:
{{substring(ifempty(9[1].history; "") & "

[Assistant]: " & 2.result; max(0; length(ifempty(9[1].history; "") & "
[Customer]: " & ifempty(7.messages[1].text.body; "[Non-text message]") & "
[Assistant]: " & 2.result) - 3800); 3800)}}
